text: The function of hydrostatic release unit is:

options.text: Substitute for limit switch of gravity davits
To automatically unhook the lashing and release the life raft when the ship sinks
For releasing life raft in bad weather
For releasing lifeboat from sinking vessel

explanation: The hydrostatic release unit (HRU) is designed to operate automatically at a depth of 1.5 to 4 meters. When a vessel sinks, the pressure forces a piston to cut a weak link, allowing the liferaft to float free and inflate, thus preventing it from being pulled down by the sinking vessel.
